meaning: adj.至上的,最高的,最主要的adv.在最上,最初,首先
examples: These thoughts were uppermost in my mind.
The economy appears to be uppermost in people's minds.
John was on the uppermost floor of the three-storey gatehouse.
But ahead of such reform, what will be uppermost in Harriet Harman's mind today?
For example, what financial and other life factors are uppermost in our minds at the time?
